result.primaryHypothesis: The permanent architectural envelope is fully preserved.
result.hypothesisAnalysis: A thorough visual inspection of the staged image, comparing it to the baseline architectural model, indicates that all permanent architectural elements, including wall planes, corners, and reference features (door D1, AC unit AC1), remain unchanged and true to their baseline descriptions. The camera perspective and field of view also appear identical. The advisory signals suggesting changes in wall count, boundary segments, and wall extent classification for the staged image appear to be erroneous based on direct visual evidence.
result.architecturalClaim: One or more structural baseline architectural statements are no longer true in the staged image.
